message:
fix(test): improve parallel mode test assertions and mocks

- Fix useless assertion ([[ elapsed -ge 0 ]] always true) by changing
  to meaningful check ([[ elapsed -lt 30 ]] verifies completion time)
- Add missing progress_summary mock to all parallel sweep tests
- Update comment to honestly describe the smoke test nature
